investigation_summary: Major items: EU Court of Justice 2024 restoring €13B Irish state-aid tax decision; settled iPhone performance throttling (~$500M US class action, ~$1B global); active DOJ 2024 antitrust case; EU DMA non-compliance exposure; NLRB union interference findings (2023); DRC cobalt child-labor suits ongoing. Counterbalanced by stronger CDP trajectory vs peers and published supplier responsibility reports showing recurring noncompliance Apple acknowledges.

profile.tax_summary: 2016 EC: illegal state aid to Ireland ~€13B — recovery ordered. 2020 General Court annulment; ECJ 2024 set aside annulment — recovery posture reinstated per public judgment summary. Historical Double Irish / Dutch Sandwich routing. Recent US effective rate 14–16% vs 21% statutory cited in analyses. Large offshore cash historically reported.
profile.legal_summary: 2020: throttle settlement — admitted degrading older iPhones via updates without adequate disclosure. 2024: DOJ complaint — App Store / NFC / interoperability. 2024: DMA gatekeeper compliance disputes. Epic v. Apple (2021) — mixed ruling; payments remedy contested. NLRB 2023: unlawful coordination against retail unions. DRC cobalt: active wrongful-death / child labor suits name Apple.
profile.labor_summary: Foxconn Shenzhen suicides (2010–2013) documented; nets and wage increases followed. Supplier reports still cite overtime and recruitment-fee issues. Cobalt recycled-content pledge not met per 2024 reporting cited in press.
profile.environmental_summary: Carbon-neutral operations claim; 2030 supply-chain neutrality target. Right-to-repair: historical lobbying against repair laws; Self Service Repair launched 2022 with pricing / parts availability critiques. CDP A- (2023).
profile.political_summary: ~$9.4M federal lobbying (2023). No corporate PAC; employee PACs separate. China manufacturing footprint creates geopolitical dependency.
profile.product_health: RF EMF Group 2B classification (no proven consumer risk at typical use). PFAS in some keyboards (third-party tests); phase-out stated.
profile.executive_summary: Tim Cook — disclosed wealth large; no corruption findings here. Board heavy finance representation.
